goal: Build and release a local Windows web application for monthly loan interest accrual from standardized Excel input.

tasks.title: Project bootstrap and executable test baseline
tasks.last_outcome: Independent verification PASS; 7 bootstrap tests passed.

tasks.title: Domain models, validation contracts, and calculation engine
tasks.last_outcome: Independent retest PASS; 54 bootstrap/domain tests passed and high-precision failures closed.

tasks.title: Standard Excel template, safe import, and whole-workbook validation
tasks.last_outcome: Independent verification plus supervisor supplemental check PASS; 79 regression tests passed.

tasks.title: Atomic calculation pipeline and fixed-value Excel export
tasks.last_outcome: Independent verification PASS; 85 regression tests through pipeline passed.

tasks.title: Historical workbook read-only differential validator
tasks.last_outcome: Independent verification PASS; 82 historical regression tests passed and source hash unchanged.

tasks.title: FastAPI APIs and Jinja2 browser interface
tasks.last_outcome: Web/API implementation complete; 8 web tests and 96 non-E2E regression tests passed. Independent review found only AC-32 real-browser coverage outstanding, which is owned by dependent task LIA-T08 after Windows startup delivery.

tasks.title: Windows setup/start scripts and runtime integration
tasks.last_outcome: Independent fix-round retest PASS; 11 Windows tests passed, fresh-port two-run smoke was loopback-only with clean process and port release, and 107 non-E2E regression tests passed.

tasks.title: Playwright user journeys and final release verification
tasks.last_outcome: Final release verification PASS; bootstrap 7, unit 53, integration 45, historical 3, two-run Windows smoke, E2E 2, release 3, AC-01 through AC-32 pass, and isolated reviewer Round 2 final_decision pass.
